title: Implement audit logging system
original_text: Implemented comprehensive audit logging system. Added logging for all user actions. Implemented log retention and archival. Added log search and filtering. Implemented log export functionality. Added audit trail for compliance. Implemented log tamper detection. Added audit dashboard for administrators. Added tests for audit logging. Result: 44 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Add logging for all user actions
- Add audit trail and tamper detection
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(audit): implement comprehensive audit logging"
